artifacts.description: XcodeBuildMCP semantic UI-tree excerpts for D1 playback states.
Shared build, runtime, simulator, and command log references for the local evidence run.

fixtures: UITestSeed downloaded This American Life episode
run.live_dependency_rationale: No paid provider or live LLM dependency is used by the seeded playback path.

branches.trigger: Tap Play on episode detail and observe mini-player elapsed time.
branches.expected: Mini-player appears and elapsed time advances.

branches.trigger: Pause and resume from a held mid-episode position.
branches.expected: Covered by adjacent PLAY-002/PLAY-003 rows; blocked by #718 in this run.

attempts.notes: PLAY-001 is proven: playback started, mini-player appeared, and elapsed advanced from 0:06 to 0:23. Adjacent pause/resume validation is blocked by #718.

execution.retry_policy: Re-run adjacent PLAY-002/PLAY-003 after #718; PLAY-001 can remain pass_with_issues from current start/progress evidence.

branch_coverage.trigger: Tap Play and wait for elapsed label.

branch_coverage.expected: Adjacent PLAY-002/PLAY-003 validation resumes from held position.

verdict.summary: PLAY-001 is evidence-backed: tapping Play starts playback, the mini-player appears, and elapsed time advances. Adjacent pause/resume rows remain blocked by #718.
verdict.score_gate_explanation: The current evidence satisfies PLAY-001 while carrying #718 as an adjacent playback fixture risk.

attempted_test.summary: Executed PLAY-001 locally with XcodeBuildMCP using --UITestSeed. Captured episode detail, mini-player playback, elapsed advance, and full-player end state.

actual_result.summary: Playback started, mini-player appeared, and elapsed advanced from 0:06 to 0:23. The full player later showed 1:00 and -0:00 with Play controls, which is tracked as adjacent pause/resume blocker #718.

artifacts.summary: Attached three current screenshots, a semantic UI-tree excerpt, and shared log references.

ui_polish_report.summary: Episode detail, mini-player, and full player expose clear native controls and identifiers, including player-play-pause and mini-player-play-pause.

ux_polish_report.summary: Start feedback is clear for PLAY-001. The fixture end state prevents adjacent pause/resume validation.

performance_metrics.summary: Elapsed label advanced from 0:06 to 0:23 after a 4.5s wait, proving playback progress. The mismatch between visible 5m metadata and 1:00 end state is tracked as a blocker.

defects_issues_filed.summary: Filed #718 for the seeded playback duration/resume validation blocker affecting adjacent PLAY-002/PLAY-003 coverage.

verdict.summary: Evidence-backed pass with issues for PLAY-001. Playback start is proven; adjacent pause/resume remains blocked by fixture/player state.

attempted_test.rationale: A current simulator run captured the playback path through full player, but the resume branch is blocked.

actual_result.rationale: PLAY-001 start/progress behavior is validated; adjacent pause/resume coverage is blocked by #718.

artifacts.rationale: Screenshots, UI tree, and log references are attached; no audio/video recording is attached.

performance.rationale: Playback progress was measured by elapsed labels, but the fixture duration mismatch blocks stronger performance claims.

reliability_flakiness.rationale: The local fixture/player state prevents deterministic pause/resume validation.

defects_issues_filed.rationale: The blocker is filed as #718 with evidence paths.

verdict.rationale: PLAY-001 passes with issues because adjacent playback fixture coverage is blocked.

functional_correctness.rationale: PLAY-001 start/progress passes; adjacent pause/resume cannot be validated.

evidence_reproducibility.rationale: Current screenshots, UI tree, metrics, and issue link are attached.

product_experience.rationale: Player controls render clearly, but the end-state mismatch hurts trust.

engineering_quality.rationale: PLAY-001 has elapsed-label evidence, but the fixture duration mismatch blocks adjacent validation.

follow_through.rationale: A GitHub issue is filed; revalidation remains open.

ui.summary: Player surfaces have clear controls and stable accessibility identifiers.

ux.summary: Start feedback and mini-player state are clear; the fixture end state prevents adjacent pause/resume confidence.

performance.summary: Elapsed labels advanced during playback; no Instruments/audio trace is attached.
gaps: No audio trace; fixture duration mismatch.

accessibility.summary: Controls expose semantic labels, but VoiceOver/Dynamic Type/contrast were not audited.

missing.reason: Seeded playback reaches an apparent end state before adjacent pause/resume rows can be validated.
VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, and contrast were not audited.

evidence.redaction_summary: Screenshots and UI-tree excerpts contain seeded public podcast data only. No secrets are exposed.

metrics.name: Mini-player elapsed-label advance
metrics.budget: Position must advance after playback starts
metrics.method: XcodeBuildMCP snapshots before and after 4.5s wait

metrics.name: Visible metadata duration minus player end-state duration
metrics.budget: Expected zero mismatch for deterministic seed

instrumentation_gaps.summary: Seeded audio/metadata mismatch blocks pause/resume validation.
No VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, contrast, Reduce Motion, or target-size audit was run.

risks.title: D1 could be misread as validating resume despite fixture end-state blocker.
risks.mitigation: Keep adjacent PLAY-002/PLAY-003 blocked until #718 is fixed and those rows are re-run.

issues.title: D1: Seeded playback reaches end at 1:00 despite 5m episode metadata, blocking resume validation

next_actions.title: Fix or replace the local playback seed so D1 can validate pause/resume mid-episode.
Re-run D1 and capture pause, held position, resume, and mini-player toggle evidence.
